groups.name: coder-workspace
groups.description: Coder workspace base: container tooling shared by every workspace

commands.install: sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings && curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg && sudo chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(. /etc/os-release && echo \"$VERSION_CODENAME\") stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list >/dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker-ce-cli docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin
commands.upgrade: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker-ce-cli docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin

commands.install: sudo mkdir -p -m 755 /etc/apt/keyrings && wget -qO- https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo tee /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg >/dev/null && sudo chmod go+r /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list >/dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gh
commands.upgrade: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gh

options.upgrade: (cd $HOME/.oh-my-zsh && git pull --quiet); for p in zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting; do git -C "${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}/plugins/$p" pull --quiet; done
